tasks.title: Investigate and Fix 'Database is closed' Error in IndexedDB Access
tasks.description: Analyze the database connection handling in the storage layer (likely in packages/storage/src/) to identify why 'Database is closed. Call getDb() to open a connection first.' error occurs. Modify the code to ensure getDb() is called before any database operations, and that the connection is properly opened and reused. Add error handling to prevent operations on a closed database.
acceptanceCriteria: No 'Database is closed' error occurs during normal app usage
Database connection is opened before any DB operation
Code handles closed DB gracefully without crashing
tasks.expectedResult: The database connection is reliably opened before use, preventing the 'Database is closed' error, verified by passing tests and no runtime errors.

outputPlan.description: Fix database connection initialization and usage to prevent closed DB errors

metadata.inputContext: Current database connection code and error logs
evidence: Code changes present in DB connection logic
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures stable database connection management, preventing runtime errors related to closed DB.

tasks.title: Audit CSS Theme Colors and Variables for Consistency
tasks.description: Review the CSS theme system files, especially apps/web/src/styles/theme.css and packages/theme/src/tokens.ts, to identify any inconsistencies or bugs related to color variables and theme switching. Check for hard-coded colors in components that violate the design token system. Document any issues found for fixing.
acceptanceCriteria: All colors use CSS variables from the design token system
No hard-coded color values remain in component styles
Theme switching (light/dark) works correctly with color changes
tasks.expectedResult: A report or list of CSS color/theme inconsistencies and bugs is produced, with clear identification of files and lines to fix.

outputPlan.description: Audit report listing CSS color and theme variable inconsistencies and bugs

metadata.inputContext: Current CSS theme files and component styles
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a clear list of CSS color and theme bugs to fix for consistent theming.

tasks.title: Fix CSS Color and Theme Bugs Based on Audit Findings
tasks.description: Apply fixes to CSS files and component styles to resolve the color and theme bugs identified in the audit. Replace any hard-coded colors with design token CSS variables. Ensure dark and light themes switch colors correctly. Test UI visually and with automated tests if available.
acceptanceCriteria: No hard-coded colors remain in styles
Theme colors update correctly on theme toggle
UI color bugs reported previously are resolved
tasks.expectedResult: CSS and component styles use only design token variables for colors, and theme switching works flawlessly with no visual bugs.

outputPlan.description: Fix color variables and theme styles
Replace hard-coded colors with CSS variables in components

metadata.inputContext: CSS color audit report and current styles
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures consistent and correct theming with no color bugs in the UI.

tasks.title: Validate Database and Theme Bug Fixes with Automated Tests
tasks.description: Run the full test suite to validate that the database connection fix and CSS theme color fixes do not introduce regressions. Include any UI snapshot or visual regression tests if configured. Confirm no errors or warnings related to database or CSS appear.
acceptanceCriteria: No database connection errors occur during tests
No CSS or theme related warnings or errors appear
tasks.expectedResult: Test suite passes cleanly confirming bug fixes are stable and effective.

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Confirms stability and correctness of bug fixes before release.
